title: The Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act, 2005
full_text: The Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act, 2005 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200542 Act Number: 42 Enactment Date: 2005-09-05 Act Year: 2005 Short Title: The Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act, 2005 Long Title: An Act to provide for the enhancement of livelihood security of the households in rural areas of the country by providing at least one hundred days of guaranteed wage employment in every financial year to every household whose adult members volunteer to do unskilled manual work and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto.. Ministry: Ministry of Rural Development Department: Department of Rural Development Enforcement Date: 02-02-2006 Notification: 2nd February, 2006, vide notification No. S.O. 87(E), dated 24th January, 2006, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II sec.3 (ii). Schedule 1. SCHEDULE I. Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2. SCHEDULE II.
